descriptionShort: Red Deer Rustlers defeat Richmond Sockeyes 7-5 in overtime in Western Centennial Cup semifinal game, taking 3-2 series lead.
descriptionLong: In a Western Centennial Cup semifinal matchup on April 15, the Red Deer Rustlers beat the Richmond Sockeyes 7-5 in overtime, taking a 3-2 series lead. Jason Phillips' penalty shot late in overtime was stopped by goaltender Ken Weiss, who made 46 saves. Dixon Ward scored the overtime winner 59 seconds into the extra period. The article also quotes Rustlers GM Graham Parsons regarding CAHA fan conduct warnings.

attribution.headline: Rustlers Hold Off Sockeyes in Overtime
